title: alignment with OpenContainers
body:
Hi, I'm wondering if anyone here has looked at the signing discussion here:

https://github.com/opencontainers/image-spec/issues/22

comments.body:
@mtrmac ^^

@cgwalters we're implementing something wrt OCI images right now fwiw (but no signing yet)
I am going to close this issue, since I don't think anyone is working on it, and signing is a black hole in the OCI.
